discrepancies.subject: W3-DIV-1 LOAD-BEARING -- Slot 6 Painleve bridge framing (W1/W2 conjecture vs W3 theorem-or-remark)
discrepancies.w1_w2_position: Slot 6 = main conjecture with V_quad as evidence; W2-AMEND-2 stated 'Painleve bridge can be stated as a conjecture with V_quad as evidence -- conjectures are standard in flagship papers'
discrepancies.w3_position: Conjecture-framing inside a flagship landing theorems creates tonal asymmetry; referees at Inventiones/IMRN read main conjectures as 'central claim is unproven'. Reframe to Theorem-conditional-on-Item-11 OR Section-6-remark-only; demote-on-Item-11-rejection pre-cutoff
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W3 amendment. Slot 6 framing decision becomes coupled to Item 11 (Nonlinearity in-flight) verdict timing: (a) if Item 11 accepts pre-cutoff -> Slot 6 = Theorem with V_quad as worked example; (b) if Item 11 rejects pre-cutoff -> Slot 6 = Section-6-remark-only with V_quad/PIII worked example; (c) if Item 11 still in-flight at cutoff -> Slot 6 = remark with conditional-on-Item-11 footnote

discrepancies.subject: W3-DIV-2 LOAD-BEARING -- Slot 7 over-scoping (W1/W2 broad supplements vs W3 PCF-only)
discrepancies.w1_w2_position: Slot 7 = remaining results cited as Zenodo supplements: T2B + Finite-Depth Rigidity + Channel Theory outline + AEAL/ZTEK/SIARC governance stack as separate-program cross-references
discrepancies.w3_position: Slot 7 over-scoped; AEAL/ZTEK/SIARC must NOT appear in flagship (separate program; dilutes math identity); Channel Theory outline -> Move 3 standalone not flagship citation; cut to PCF-supplements only (T2B + Finite-Depth Rigidity)
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W3 amendment. Slot 7 trimmed to {T2B, Finite-Depth Rigidity}. Governance stack and Channel Theory outline removed from flagship. Plus cascade-citation backlash mitigation (Risk #2): AT MOST 4 self-Zenodo cites total; consolidate rest into single 'Supplementary computational materials' Zenodo deposit concurrent with arxiv submission.

discrepancies.subject: W3-DIV-3 -- Cutoff date (W2 pure-calendar 2026-07-01 vs W3 conditional hybrid)
discrepancies.w2_position: Hard cutoff 2026-07-01 calendar; beyond which no new closed results fold in regardless of what lands
discrepancies.w3_position: First Monday after EITHER (Frontier-A Phase 1 verdict lands) OR (2026-07-15), whichever comes first. Trades 2 weeks of optionality for cascade-completion robustness; prevents abandoning cascade mid-stream
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W3 conditional cutoff. Frontier-A Phase 1 verdict (PROMPT 191A pending operator authorization) is the soft trigger; 2026-07-15 is the calendar backstop. Operator should treat W3 trigger as binding from this point forward unless explicit deferral.

discrepancies.subject: W3-DIV-4 -- Item 11 V_quad/PIII disposition (W2 Move-2 blanket vs W3 conditional on Slot 6 framing)
discrepancies.w2_position: Item 11 'almost certainly better folded into Move 2 (Painleve standalone) rather than resubmitted as-is'
discrepancies.w3_position: Item 11 disposition depends on Slot 6 framing: (a) if Slot 6 reframed to theorem -> Item 11 folds into flagship Slot 6 as worked example; (b) if Slot 6 stays as remark -> W2 Move-2 disposition holds
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W3 conditional logic. Amends triage matrix v1 Section A Item 11 row: disposition = FOLD-flagship-Slot-6 (if Slot 6 = theorem) OR FOLD2-Move-2 (if Slot 6 = remark); both paths require Item 11 Nonlinearity rejection first OR explicit withdrawal at 2026-06-01 40d window expiration.

discrepancies.subject: W3-DIV-5 -- Lean-PCF formalization flagship interaction (W2-AMEND-1 load-bearing pivot vs W3 footnote-only)
discrepancies.w2_amend_1_position: Pivot L2/OPT_X2 toward formalizing PCF result (d=2 discriminant predicate); cite as flagship element
discrepancies.w3_position: Support L2 pivot itself BUT argue against Lean being load-bearing flagship element. Top-general-math referees treat in-progress formalizations as either irrelevant or as flag-author-needs-formal-verification-to-be-trusted; either reading hurts. Footnote-only treatment neutralizes both. Keep Lean work and flagship in adjacent lanes not stacked.
discrepancies.resolution: ADOPT W3 III + one-sentence footnote treatment. Flagship body text omits Lean; single footnote at first d=2 transcendence predicate statement: 'A Lean 4 formalization of the d=2 case is in preparation; see [Zenodo DOI when minted].' No date promise; no completion-scope characterization. L2 Lean work proceeds as Move 7 standalone deposit (separate publication-value channel in AI-epistemic-governance track).
